_help: Registry of guilds on the Boards. serverRank/members/avgLevel/totalXp are synced automatically from the game's official leaderboard API by scripts/sync_guilds.py (3-hour cron, see update-guilds.yml) — do not edit them by hand. Editorial fields (tag, region, lang, site, motto, created) are managed via issues/PRs and never touched by the sync. null renders as '—' on the site.

guilds.name: La Clauderie
guilds.motto: On quête, on raid, on rigole — ensemble.
